title: Fencing, Groundworks & Landscaping
overview: Carry out and evidence a workplace activity related to fencing, groundworks & landscaping.
knowledgeQuestion: Explain the knowledge required and relevant legislation or standards.
skillQuestion: Describe how you completed the task safely and to specification.
behaviourQuestion: Explain how your behaviour supported quality, teamwork and professionalism.
combinedStatementPrompt: Write approximately 100 words describing planning, tools, materials, safe working, quality checks, environmental considerations and lessons learned.
